sections.title: Base Digital
sections.odds: Base/rookie cards are digital. All parallels are physical cards. · PHYSICAL PARALLELS: Silver Foil (1:2.5), Blue Foil #/399, Red Foil #/91, Green Foil #/25, Gold Spectrum 1/1, Printing Plates 1/1. · EPACK ACHIEVEMENTS: Rainbow Foil, Speckled Rainbow Foil, Gold Speckled Rainbow Foil.

sections.title: Base Silver Rainbow Foil Autographs
sections.odds: Overall odds: Base - 1:194 packs; Rookies - 1:122 packs.

sections.title: Medallions
sections.odds: 50 cards. 1:2 packs. · PARALLEL CARDS: Gold #/200, Platinum #/100, Ruby Red #/50, Sapphire Blue #/25, Emerald Green #/10, Black 1/1. · ACHIEVEMENT PARALLELS: Titian.

sections.title: Pop Culture
sections.odds: Overall odds: Base - 1:25 packs; SP - 1:47 packs; SSP - 1:188 packs.
